name: MuscleBlaze Fat Burner 90 Capsules
description: A thermogenic fat burner formulated with green tea extract, L-carnitine, green coffee bean extract and caffeine anhydrous to support metabolism and energy during workouts. Designed for gym-goers pursuing a calorie-deficit cutting phase alongside a balanced diet.

name: MuscleTech Hydroxycut Hardcore Elite 100 Capsules
description: An advanced thermogenic containing caffeine anhydrous, green coffee bean extract, coleus forskohlii and L-theanine to support energy, focus and thermogenesis. Intended for experienced users combining training and a controlled diet during a cutting cycle.

name: Nutrex Research Lipo-6 Black Ultra Concentrate 60 Capsules
description: A highly concentrated single-capsule thermogenic with caffeine anhydrous, theobromine, yohimbine HCl and advantra Z for appetite control and energy support. Recommended for advanced users who already tolerate stimulants and follow a structured cutting plan.
